title: SPP Hourly Load JSON API
description:
⚠️ This dataset is deprecated in favor of [SPP Load Hourly](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/spp_load_hourly). That dataset has all the same info as this dataset, but in “long” rather than “wide” format. It also has additional areas and details on conforming vs non-conforming loads.

Hourly load data in SPP by Area.

Released daily around 5pm CT. for the previous day.

💡 The Areas in this dataset are the legacy balancing authorities for the region that SPP serves.
